title: Quantity Surveyor – Interior Fit Out
description:
As a Quantity Surveyor, you will play a key role in the commercial delivery of our interior fit-out projects. Reporting to senior commercial management and working closely with Project Managers and design teams, you will manage the cost, procurement, and commercial aspects of projects from tender through to final account.

This role suits someone comfortable working in a fast-paced Design & Build environment, with a strong grasp of variations, subcontractor management and cost control.

Key responsibilities:

1.       Cost Estimation and Budgeting

·       Prepare accurate cost estimations for interior fit-out projects, based on detailed analysis of the project specifications, materials, labour and other relevant factors.

·       Develop project budgets and ensure adherence to budgetary constraints throughout the project lifecycle

·       Collaborate with senior commercial managers and project managers to establish cost-effective solutions and value engineering exercises to optimize project costs &/or time

2.       Procurement and Tendering

·       Source and negotiate with suppliers and subcontractors to obtain competitive pricing for materials, equipment, and services required

·       Evaluate tender submissions, prepare contract documents, and administer contracts in compliance with company policy and regulatory requirements

·       Monitor contract performance, variations, and claims, and support the project team in resolving discrepancies or disputes in a timely manner

3.       Quantity Take-Off and Measurement

·       Conduct thorough quantity take-offs and measurements from drawings, to accurately assess material quantities and project requirements

·       Maintain records of quantities, measurements and related documentation for reporting and auditing purposes

4.       Cost Control and Reporting

·       Monitor project expenditures, analyse cost variances, and support the project team to implement measures to control costs and mitigate risks

·       Support the project manager in the preparation of progress reports and cost forecasts. Keep stakeholders informed of project performance and financial status.

5.       Compliance and Documentation

·       Ensure compliance with relevant regulations, codes, and standards governing fit-out projects

·       Maintain accurate records of project documentation, including contracts, subcontracts, invoices, change orders and other financial documents

·       Coordinate with internal teams and external consultants to obtain necessary approvals, permits, and certifications as required.

Requirements:

·       Experience as a Quantity Surveyor in interior fit-out or construction projects

·       Practical experience managing procurement, variations, and subcontractor accounts

·       Comfortable working in short-duration, fast-track project environments

·       Strong attention to detail, commercial awareness, and communication skills

·       Proficient in Excel.

·       Able to speak and write in English and Mandarin

postedCompany.description:
S&techs is a full service Main Contractor / Construction Manager, founded in year 2000, serving clients throughout the Asian region. Our core values are the cornerstones of our success and include our dedication to

- Client services

- Excellence

- Partnering

- Relationship building

- Integrity

- Enthusiasm


Our group of companies offer a full construction service commencing with building the Core Structure to completing the interior fit out. The sectors we service include Commercial, Banking & Finance, Mission Critical, Retail, Hotel and Hospitality, Industrial & Manufacturing.


Our business has since developed into Hong Kong, Greater China, Taiwan, Japan, other parts of the Asia Region, servicing not just Multi-national clients but also local clients


Our staff are from various cultural and ethical backgrounds, and we are an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from any background.
postedCompany.name: S&TECHS CONSTRUCTION (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.
